title: AAA Particles
body:
- This is a library mod that enables using effekseer particles (.efkefc) in minecraft. - Defaultly it'll replace vanilla's lightning effect by a effekseer effect. ![Effekseer Lightning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c28bf6797ac86c3998bc6e80548df26cb9e05654.jpeg) - No need to rename resources used by effects (like textures), this mod removes the name validation on resource locations' paths. - Loads effek from resource packs, see the source code for an example on how to put your files to make it work :) Contact:
[![Join Discord](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/https://discord.gg/pkpNN77yfs)](https://discord.gg/pkpNN77yfs)
